meaning: n.商人,贩子,中间人vt.贩卖,传播
examples: Fear monger, reader, are you understanding this?
I surely got beaten when I bought rice from a monger.
He was not a fame - monger, but merely one of God's mad lovers.
Four years before that Vice President Al Gore looked to be the bigger spender and more avid war-monger, but President Bush seized those mantles once inaugurated.
For those who use the label "fear monger" to excuse themselves from intellectually engaging in the missile defense debate, it is time to examine the facts.
